recap: South Central Kings dominated from tip-off behind 34 points from DeShawn Carter. The Kings defense held the Warriors to just 18 points in the second half.
A thriller decided in the final seconds. Tyrone Jackson's put-back with 2 seconds left sealed it for the Ballers.
